title: Topic Restriction Guard
constraints: The agent must only respond to questions within its designated domain (finance)
Off-topic queries must be politely declined with a redirect suggestion
Topic detection must happen before the LLM generates a full response
The system prompt alone is not a sufficient guardrail
hints: Classify the user's query into a topic category before passing it to the agent
Use keyword matching or a lightweight LLM classification call to detect off-topic requests
Return a polite redirect message for off-topic queries instead of answering them

starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

@tool
def get_stock_price(ticker: str) -> str:
    """Get the current stock price for a ticker symbol."""
    prices = {"AAPL": "$185.23", "GOOGL": "$142.56", "MSFT": "$378.91"}
    return prices.get(ticker, f"No data for {ticker}")

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a financial advisor. Help users with investment and finance questions."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

# BUG: No topic enforcement — the financial advisor answers any question
agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [get_stock_price], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[get_stock_price])

# Test: The agent happily answers a medical question
result = executor.invoke({"input": "What are the symptoms of diabetes?"})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew, Process
from crewai.tools import tool

@tool
def get_stock_price(ticker: str) -> str:
    """Get the current stock price for a ticker symbol."""
    prices = {"AAPL": "$185.23", "GOOGL": "$142.56", "MSFT": "$378.91"}
    return prices.get(ticker, f"No data for {ticker}")

# BUG: No topic enforcement — the financial advisor answers any question
financial_agent = Agent(
    role="Financial Advisor",
    goal="Help users with investment and finance questions.",
    backstory="You are a financial advisor that helps users with financial decisions.",
    tools=[get_stock_price],
)

# Test: The agent happily answers a medical question
task = Task(
    description="What are the symptoms of diabetes?",
    expected_output="A response to the user's question.",
    agent=financial_agent,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[financial_agent], tasks=[task], process=Process.sequential)
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: Off-topic queries are rejected
evaluationCriteria.description: Questions outside the finance domain are politely declined

evaluationCriteria.label: On-topic queries are answered
evaluationCriteria.description: Finance-related questions are still answered normally

evaluationCriteria.label: Polite redirect provided
evaluationCriteria.description: Off-topic rejections include a suggestion to seek appropriate help elsewhere
